title: COSTI RELATIVI ALLA POSITIVITA’ IN ALLEVAMENTO DOVUTA ALL'INFLUENZA AVIARE AD ALTA PATOGENICITÀ (HPAI) IN SPAGNA
description: A factsheet detailing the economic costs associated with high pathogenicity avian influenza outbreaks in Spanish poultry farms. It quantifies egg production losses, mandatory culling and downtime expenses, and outlines compensation and biosecurity measures.
